overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with red hair and a glowing green backpack walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character walks along a busy downtown street with elevated highways and large digital billboards before turning into a darker plaza to sit on a bench.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic downtown street under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath elevated highway structures and neon billboards

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: large concrete overpass with circular ventilation openings spanning across the street
massive illuminated screen displaying a woman's face with 'NICOLA' text in pink neon
bright soda advertisement with green and red neon colors on the left side
tall building with dark glass facade and horizontal neon accent lighting
tall modern street light with bright white illumination

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide downtown sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway structure covered in digital billboards. Neon advertisements illuminate the night, casting colorful reflections on the wet pavement. Sparse pedestrian traffic moves in the same direction while vehicles pass on the multi-lane road to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk with street vendors and pedestrians

events.description: passing a street vendor with a glowing red neon cart on the left side of the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk passing various pedestrians and approaching a street vendor

notable_agents.action: street vendor standing beside a cart with red neon lighting

entered.detail: large vertical advertisement showing a hand holding a glass with 'REAL WATER' text
food cart with bright red neon strip lighting underneath

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the downtown street as the crowd density increases slightly. A prominent 'REAL WATER' billboard appears on the left, and the character passes a street vendor with a glowing red cart. The elevated highway remains overhead while the surrounding buildings shift in perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: semi-enclosed plaza with seating under building overhang

events.description: turns left off the main street into a darker semi-covered plaza area with benches
character approaches and sits down on a concrete bench

agents.ego_description: turning left into a darker plaza area and sitting down on a concrete bench to rest

notable_agents.action: person standing near metal railing looking out toward the street

entered.detail: dark concrete building overhang providing shelter and blocking the sky
low concrete seating with orange neon strip lighting underneath
illuminated vending machine with glowing advertisements on the side
safety railing along the edge of the plaza overlooking the street below

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a darker, semi-enclosed plaza area sheltered by a building overhang. The space features a concrete bench with orange neon underlighting and a vending machine. After entering the space, the character sits down on the bench while another person stands nearby at the railing overlooking the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit downtown thoroughfare into the quiet seclusion of a sheltered urban plaza. It begins with the character walking along a wide sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway, where digital billboards cast colorful reflections across the wet pavement. As the character continues forward, the crowd density increases and the environment shifts past a glowing red street vendor cart and a prominent water advertisement. The scene then transitions as the character turns left, leaving the bright main street for a darker, semi-enclosed area beneath a building overhang. Finally, the camera settles as the character sits on a concrete bench illuminated by orange neon underlighting, positioned near a vending machine and a distant figure at a railing.
